case_title: BALWANT D THAKOR VS. JUDITH KATHLIN TOMLIN

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THAKOR, BALWANT D RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOMLIN, JUDITH KATHLIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1139 MARKET STREET, #132, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94103-1513, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT TOMLIN, JUDITH KATHLIN
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY: PRO PER SUBSTITUTED FOR MENDEZ, DAVID GERARD AS ATTORNEY FOR THAKOR, BALWANT D
DECLARATION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY COURT, CCP 585D FILED BY PLAINTIFF THAKOR, BALWANT D
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THAKOR, BALWANT D AS TO DEFENDANT TOMLIN, JUDITH KATHLIN SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE, $21.43 PER DAY FILED BY PLAINTIFF THAKOR, BALWANT D
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT TOMLIN, JUDITH KATHLIN
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT TOMLIN, JUDITH KATHLIN

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THAKOR, BALWANT D RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TOMLIN, JUDITH KATHLIN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: DEFENDANT VACATED ON 3/25/10, $1,200.00 RENT, $405.00 COSTS, $642.90 HOLDOVER DAMAGES,, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,247.90, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF THAKOR, BALWANT D AS TO DEFENDANT TOMLIN, JUDITH KATHLIN
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT TOMLIN, JUDITH KATHLIN
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THAKOR, BALWANT D SERVED FEB-25-2010, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TOMLIN, JUDITH KATHLIN
